title: Yahir's Family
html:
Yahir's Family

The Gonzalez-Vargas household is the single most-referenced entity in the corpus, and the one most prone to being flattened. The notes consistently insist on holding two readings at once: family as runway and family as wound, often in the same paragraph. The April 2025 gratitude list (2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me) names "My family" as one of six debts — alongside Ford, Boys & Girls Club, Brenda, Chan Taylor, and Kim — meaning his family is bracketed conceptually with the institutions that scaffold poor and small-town kids. This is intentional. The family is a Mexican-American immigrant scaffold, and Yahir is its literate proxy.

The roster: mom — Iracema Vargas, named explicitly for the first time in 2021 05 30 iracema graduation letter, where Yahir ghostwrites an email in her voice to fix a graduation-group scheduling mistake ("My name is Iracema Vargas. I am the mother of Yahir Gonzalez"). Her surname Vargas — distinct from his Gonzalez — is a meaningful genealogical marker. She is the FBA hustle co-conspirator (2019 11 13 coding zeal "quarantine business for dad"), the financial backstop in 2025 (2025 09 23 how im scraping by), the custodial-TDA-account opener for the 17-year-old value investor (2020 04 23 go to diamond). Dad — unnamed in the surfaced corpus but constantly present — is the source of the dad wisdom aphorisms ("Impulse decision will kill you") AND the source of the December 2022 Christmas Eve psychosis episode (2022 12 25 christmas eve 2022) where Yahir spits at him and Valeria screams "Fuck you, you are going to die alone." Yahir explicitly refuses to flatten him: "He is caring about us way behind most dads, and obviously holds down a house." Emilio ("Yermy") is the younger brother and the most-protected node — Yahir designates himself, at age 16, as the family knowledge-broker who must extract context from parents "so that down the road Emilio and I will know" (2019 11 13 coding zeal). They share the Petra off-trail mountain story (2024 08 14 travel occurrences) and a once-a-week call discipline (2022 09 13 drive thru weed). Valeria is the sister-as-defender, front-line in the dad conflicts. Yesenia edits Yahir's writing.

The pattern: Yahir is the family translator from a young age — writing letters in his mother's voice, brokering hard topics, proposing his dad onto DoorDash (2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo), running scholarship apps to bring resources back, and later (per 2025 05 30 todos) buying bolts for mom and food for dad while juggling the Austin move. The "be a project youth plus donor" aspiration in that same todo is the explicit form of paying the debt forward.

Source summaries

  • 2019 11 13 coding zeal
  • 2019 12 12 talk to brenda
  • 2020 04 23 go to diamond
  • 2021 05 30 iracema graduation letter
  • 2022 07 31 vietnam route prep
  • 2022 12 25 christmas eve 2022
  • 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me

Connections

emilio · valeria · yesenia · iracema vargas · lola · dad wisdom · family as hidden runway · grants pass or · bridge income strategies · debt of gratitude · lineage as fate · 2025 09 23 how im scraping by
